title: T-054 — Warehouse labels and genealogy export UI surfaces
prompt:
# T-054 — Warehouse labels and genealogy export UI surfaces

PRD: `docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Implement label print modal and genealogy traceability page with prototype parity and export hooks.

## Implementation contract
Build the label print/reprint UI and full genealogy trace query page. The label preview may remain HTML preview but must call the backend ZPL print endpoint. Genealogy export must expose CSV/PDF action hooks and depth warnings.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/components/warehouse/labels/** [create]
- apps/web/app/(app)/warehouse/genealogy/** [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/other-screens.jsx

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given label_print_modal renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/warehouse/modals.jsx, then template/printer/copies/queue/reprint fields and expired use_by stamp behavior match.
2. Given genealogy_traceability_page renders, then search, forward/backward/full toggle, depth 1-10, loading copy, tree/list results, and FSMA export buttons match prototype.
3. Given genealogy query is run by a user from another tenant, then RLS/server guard blocks cross-tenant LP visibility.
4. Given components are inspected, then data-prototype-label markers exist for label_print_modal and genealogy_traceability_page.

## Test strategy
- RED: component tests for label form validation and printer offline branch.
- GREEN: Playwright tests for genealogy mode/depth controls and export disabled state before results.
- Run pnpm test and pnpm playwright test --grep @warehouse-labels-genealogy-ui.

## Risk red lines
- Do not represent HTML preview as actual ZPL rendering.
- Do not allow cross-tenant genealogy traversal.
- Do not build EPCIS P2 here.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: rule_registry, warehouses/locations/printers, feature flags, tenant security policy
PO/TO/WO read models, RM root reservations, WO release/cancel hooks
LP lookup, barcode validation, lock protocol, FEFO suggestion, consume-to-WO
WO material consumption and output LP creation events
